data.name: My Furry Detective 🐾
data.detailed_description:
Not everyone can be a detective; it requires practical skills and logical thinking. Some people, however, pursue their dreams despite common sense. Your new partner, Eva, is just that type of person—lacking skills but full of motivation to become the best detective in the city. No one has lasted more than a month as her partner, and everyone at the agency is betting on how long you'll stay.

"My Furry Detective" is a comedy detective story about motivation, hard work, and dreams. Investigate the crime, spend time with your partner, and who knows, maybe you’ll hit it off!

Features:

  • A captivating story with romance and comedy elements

  • HD, fully original artwork

  • Approximately 2 hours of content

  • A relaxing atmosphere

  • A charming detective!

  • A captivating story with romance and comedy elements

  • A relaxing atmosphere

  • A charming detective!
data.short_description: A mysterious crime that no one could solve now rests on your shoulders. Well, not just yours; you also have a partner from your department whom everyone makes fun of. But who knows—maybe she’s actually a great detective in disguise?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10
  • 處理器: anything from this millenium
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB RAM
  • 音效卡: potato
